sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kawl gam hong pia in kawigam hong pia in
Natat samite Sian aw na zal na, nun nuam leeng
dingin nun nuam khawl ding in
Sian aw na ang liim liap ah hong pi in.
Tui in tuipi atuam bang in kawlgama hong tuam tahen,
nong gupkhiat na tul sing lam teh thu,
Kawigam bup asiat ma in kha khan lawhnahong piain.
Hong piain Topa aw Kawlgam hong pia in.
Kawlgam aading in khua ul sisuakin,
Khitui naptui tawh lobang hial ding in,
It na melma te nuih siam hong lelte,
Sian aw na ang liim liap ah hong pi-in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tho in la taang in suunnitang bang in,
Topa khuavakin nang hong tan zohi
Natan na sung ah, Kawl gam minam te,
Hong uk kumpi te hong paiding uh hi.
